product.problem: A validator needs to reject approved Gate B status without approval audit metadata.
core_flows: Validate artifact root and fail on missing approval audit
success_criteria: Artifact root validation fails with status.md missing Gate B approval audit

data_flow: Load spec, detect approval, inspect status.md
edge_cases: Approved spec without status approval audit
verification: Negative fixture expects status.md missing Gate B approval audit

evidence.title: Negative fixture setup
evidence.used_for: Confirms this fixture is intended to fail audit validation.

evidence.title: Node.js Introduction
evidence.used_for: Grounded the Node.js standard-library validator dependency so this fixture fails only on the missing Gate B approval audit.
